CREATE TABLE time_table (id INTEGER, event_time TIME);
INSERT INTO time_table VALUES (1, TIME '14:21:13'), (2, TIME '00:00:00'), (3, TIME '23:59:59');
SELECT datepart('minute', event_time) FROM time_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT datepart('hour', event_time) FROM time_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT datepart('second', event_time) FROM time_table WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, datepart('minute', event_time) AS minute_part FROM time_table;
SELECT id, datepart('hour', event_time) AS hour_part FROM time_table WHERE event_time BETWEEN TIME '12:00:00' AND TIME '14:59:59';
SELECT t1.id, datepart('minute', t1.event_time) FROM time_table t1 JOIN (SELECT id FROM time_table WHERE id > 1) t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, datepart('second', event_time + INTERVAL '1 minute') AS adjusted_seconds FROM time_table;
SELECT id, datepart('minute', event_time) AS min_part, datepart('hour', event_time) AS hour_part FROM time_table WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
WITH time_parts AS (SELECT id, datepart('minute', event_time) AS min_part FROM time_table) SELECT * FROM time_parts WHERE min_part > 0;
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM time_table WHERE datepart('hour', event_time) BETWEEN 0 AND 23;
